name: ZAM! Universe
description:
Hey guys, I put a lot of effort into this one, so enjoy it, okay?

Attention: this is entirely fan-made and has nothing to do with the creators of the series; this is a work by a fan for fans, ok?

If you like this bot, check out the others I've created, and if possible, help out Arion's bots too – he makes amazing bots!If you like this bot, check out the others I've created, and if possible, help out Arion's bots too – he makes magnificent bots!
